# F080 Source Delta Rank JEPA Wrapper

## Decision
`F080_FULL_JEPA_WRAPPER_MIXED_OR_INCONCLUSIVE`

## Purpose
F079 repaired source/delta/rank structure outside the full JEPA wrapper. F080 tests whether that repair survives a real cross-modal, action-conditioned JEPA implementation with online RNA/image encoders, EMA target encoders, stop-gradient targets, query predictors, RNA->image and image->RNA losses, and control+coarse-program action transition prediction.

## Key Results
- image-teacher transition improvement: `0.209087`
- image-teacher delta cosine: `0.782088`
- image-teacher recall@1: `1.000000`
- image-teacher delta rank: `8.264212`
- image-teacher action-negative gap: `0.043962`
- direct learned-latent transition improvement: `0.117987`
- direct learned-latent delta cosine: `0.655142`
- RNA->image recall@1: `0.526749`
- image->RNA recall@1: `0.794239`
- target-image cosine: `0.762170`
- transition-image cosine: `0.957209`
- F079 transition reference: `0.137543`
- image-teacher minus F079 transition gap: `0.071544`

## JEPA Identity
Uses ProgramBootstrapJEPA online RNA/image encoders, EMA RNA/image target encoders, stop-gradient latent teachers, query-conditioned RNA->image, image->RNA, and control+action transition predictors, cross-modal JEPA losses, and action-conditioned transition losses.

## Leakage Controls
F080 uses train-only control expression centroids as source state and train-only control image PCA centroids as source teachers. Training target image-PCA teachers are train-only condition centroids. Actions are coarse program one-hot descriptors only, with fewer columns than perturbations. Eval target expression/images are used only for scoring. No condition_key, biological_key, exact perturbation one-hot, eval target means, or pooled train+test statistics are model inputs.

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F080 is a Tier 1 diagnostic wrapper test only.
